Notes: Prerequisite proves rrhost.campus.edu. has an A RRset, then UPDATE attempts to delete a specific absent A RR from that RRset. The follow-up QUERY checks whether the existing RRset remains unchanged.

Steps.Description: Prerequisite rrset_exists on rrhost.campus.edu. type A, then delete an exact A RR that is not present in the RRset.

Steps.Name: rrhost.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the A RRset is unchanged after the UPDATE.
